ques: Show the scores and main highlight of the Denver Nuggets game that occurred within the last 3 days on ESPN.
answer: The most recent Denver Nuggets game (May 1, 2026, West 1st Round Game 6 @ Minnesota) ended Timberwolves 110, Nuggets 98 (Final) — MIN won the series 4-2. Main highlight: "Jaden McDaniels leads Timberwolves on both ends of the court in 110-98 clincher to oust Nuggets in 6" — McDaniels scored 32 points with 10 rebounds and Terrence Shannon Jr. added 24 to eliminate Denver.
